subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who, through His Most Exalted Word, hath manifested the Kingdom of creation and caused the Lote-Tree to speak forth in the Supreme Paradise that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن اظهر بکلمته العلیا ملکوت الانشاء و انطق السدره فی الفردوس الاعلی بما
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God
